prompt:
A three-quarter shot of two young people seated side by side on a low velvet sofa in a club's VIP lounge section, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. She is turned slightly toward him, lips close to his ear — saying something only he can hear over the music.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners, a quiet confident expression. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20). Skin subsurface scattering visible under warm amber lounge light, specular micro-highlights on her bare shoulder and jawline, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. She wears a silver metallic bandeau top — fitted, strapless, catching every light shift. He sits beside her in a relaxed posture, dark trousers and a black tee, one arm draped along the sofa back behind her shoulder. Two or three stray hairs fall softly across the side of her neck, displaced by faint air movement, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical.
Warm low amber lounge lighting creates a private golden pool around the sofa. A dim purple accent light glows from a low table lamp nearby. Tall cocktail glasses with ice and garnish sit on the table in front of them. The mood is relaxed and unhurried — intimate closeness, bodies angled inward, a sense of shared quiet within the noise. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 3:2. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
